# Getbuild — websites and business process automations

Getbuild is a Polish digital studio building business-led websites and automations for small and medium service companies.

## Core offer

- Website packages: https://getbuild.pl/#pakiety
- Business process automation: https://getbuild.pl/#automatyzacje
- Case studies: https://getbuild.pl/realizacje
- Contact and free consultation: https://getbuild.pl/#kontakt

Getbuild does not offer CRM or e-commerce implementations. SEO, GEO and AEO are not sold as separate services; their technical foundations are built into every website package.

## Website pricing

- Landing: 1799 PLN one-time.
- Customer-service website with a company-trained AI chatbot: 2299 PLN one-time.
- Full website with admin panel, blog and knowledge base: 3099 PLN one-time.
- Business process automation: individual one-time quote after a free consultation.

## What every website includes

- analysis of the company offer, customers and way of working,
- responsive design and fast loading,
- security and basic analytics,
- technical SEO, GEO and AEO foundations,
- first realistic visualization usually within 24 hours after materials are collected,
- unlimited revisions within the agreed project scope before acceptance,
- payment after acceptance of the result,
- post-launch support: 30 days for the first two packages and 60 days for the full package.
- optional ongoing care and hosting after the included support period: 99 PLN per month; includes hosting, monitoring, backups, security updates, unlimited requests for minor corrections, and content, offer or chatbot-knowledge updates. New pages, features and larger rebuilds are quoted separately.

A simple Landing can be deployed from 72 hours when the scope and materials are ready. This is not a guaranteed timeframe for larger projects.

## Automation examples

- customer-service chatbot trained on the company's offer,
- form confirmation and inquiry notification,
- AI summary and suggested response for long messages,
- automated reminders and review requests.

Automation pricing is never quoted without process discovery.

## Identity

- Name: Getbuild
- Website: https://getbuild.pl
- Founder: Adam
- Location: Poland
- Email: getbuild.pl@gmail.com
